seo.title: Our Products & Services | SBEnterprises
seo.description: Explore our extensive range of manufacturer-certified products including servers, desktops, laptops, enterprise printers, surveillance systems, and cybersecurity firewalls.
seo.keywords: enterprise hardware, server storage, office laptops, CCTV cameras, firewall security, plotters, Cisco, Dell, HP

intro.subtitle: Catalog – Core Offerings
intro.title: Hardware, infrastructure, and facility essentials.
intro.lead: Every product is brand-new, factory-sealed and backed by a dedicated post-purchase service agreement.

coreProducts.title: Desktops & Laptops
coreProducts.desc: Entry-level to advanced laptops, desktops, tablets, netbooks, and smart gadgets — for personal use, corporate fleets, and gifting.

coreProducts.title: Server & Storage
coreProducts.desc: Enterprise-grade servers, complex storage frameworks, networking equipment, and full-scale IT infrastructure with flexible service contracts.

coreProducts.title: Printers & Plotters
coreProducts.desc: Standard office printers, wide-format plotters, and multifunction printing units for individuals and corporate environments.

coreProducts.title: CCTV Surveillance
coreProducts.desc: From basic residential security to intricate, enterprise-grade multi-site monitoring — full installation and servicing.

coreProducts.title: Firewall & Cybersecurity
coreProducts.desc: Brand-certified hardware firewalls protecting organizations of all sizes, ensuring safe and high-uptime connectivity.

otherProducts.title: Other products
otherProducts.description: Secondary tech peripherals and facility management items we supply alongside our core offerings.
